mapper.insert: INSERT INTO product_snapshot ( id, activity_id, product_id, title, cover, price, price_text, shop_id, shop_name, status, status_text, category_name, product_stock, sales, detail_url, promotion_start_time, promotion_end_time, activity_cos_ratio, activity_cos_ratio_text, cos_type, cos_type_text, ad_service_ratio, activity_ad_cos_ratio, has_douin_goods_tag, raw_payload, sync_time, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted ) VALUES ( #{snapshot.id}, #{snapshot.activityId}, #{snapshot.productId}, #{snapshot.title}, #{snapshot.cover}, #{snapshot.price}, #{snapshot.priceText}, #{snapshot.shopId}, #{snapshot.shopName}, #{snapshot.status}, #{snapshot.statusText}, #{snapshot.categoryName}, #{snapshot.productStock}, #{snapshot.sales}, #{snapshot.detailUrl}, #{snapshot.promotionStartTime}, #{snapshot.promotionEndTime}, #{snapshot.activityCosRatio}, #{snapshot.activityCosRatioText}, #{snapshot.cosType}, #{snapshot.cosTypeText}, #{snapshot.adServiceRatio}, #{snapshot.activityAdCosRatio}, #{snapshot.hasDouinGoodsTag}, #{snapshot.rawPayload}, #{snapshot.syncTime}, #{snapshot.createTime}, #{snapshot.updateTime}, #{snapshot.createBy}, #{snapshot.updateBy}, #{snapshot.deleted} ) ON CONFLICT (activity_id, product_id) DO UPDATE SET title = EXCLUDED.title, cover = EXCLUDED.cover, price = EXCLUDED.price, price_text = EXCLUDED.price_text, shop_id = EXCLUDED.shop_id, shop_name = EXCLUDED.shop_name, status = EXCLUDED.status, status_text = EXCLUDED.status_text, category_name = EXCLUDED.category_name, product_stock = EXCLUDED.product_stock, sales = EXCLUDED.sales, detail_url = EXCLUDED.detail_url, promotion_start_time = EXCLUDED.promotion_start_time, promotion_end_time = EXCLUDED.promotion_end_time, activity_cos_ratio = EXCLUDED.activity_cos_ratio, activity_cos_ratio_text = EXCLUDED.activity_cos_ratio_text, cos_type = EXCLUDED.cos_type, cos_type_text = EXCLUDED.cos_type_text, ad_service_ratio = EXCLUDED.ad_service_ratio, activity_ad_cos_ratio = EXCLUDED.activity_ad_cos_ratio, has_douin_goods_tag = EXCLUDED.has_douin_goods_tag, raw_payload = EXCLUDED.raw_payload, sync_time = EXCLUDED.sync_time, update_time = EXCLUDED.update_time, update_by = EXCLUDED.update_by, deleted = EXCLUDED.deleted WHERE product_snapshot.title IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.title OR product_snapshot.cover IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.cover OR product_snapshot.price IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.price OR product_snapshot.price_text IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.price_text OR product_snapshot.shop_id IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.shop_id OR product_snapshot.shop_name IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.shop_name OR product_snapshot.status IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.status OR product_snapshot.status_text IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.status_text OR product_snapshot.category_name IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.category_name OR product_snapshot.product_stock IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.product_stock OR product_snapshot.sales IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.sales OR product_snapshot.detail_url IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.detail_url OR product_snapshot.promotion_start_time IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.promotion_start_time OR product_snapshot.promotion_end_time IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.promotion_end_time OR product_snapshot.activity_cos_ratio IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.activity_cos_ratio OR product_snapshot.activity_cos_ratio_text IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.activity_cos_ratio_text OR product_snapshot.cos_type IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.cos_type OR product_snapshot.cos_type_text IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.cos_type_text OR product_snapshot.ad_service_ratio IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.ad_service_ratio OR product_snapshot.activity_ad_cos_ratio IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.activity_ad_cos_ratio OR product_snapshot.has_douin_goods_tag IS DISTINCT FROM EXCLUDED.has_douin_goods_tag
mapper.sql:
WHERE ps.deleted = 0 AND pos.deleted = 0 AND ps.status = 1 AND pos.selected_to_library = TRUE AND pos.display_status = 'DISPLAYING' AND (pos.audit_status IS NULL OR pos.audit_status <> 3) AND (pos.biz_status IS NULL OR UPPER(pos.biz_status) <> 'REJECTED') AND COALESCE(pos.manual_disabled, FALSE) = FALSE
AND ( ps.title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ps.product_id ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR ps.shop_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
AND ps.product_id = #{productId}
AND ps.status = #{status}
AND ps.shop_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{shopKeyword}, '%')
AND (
ps.category_name ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{category}, '%')
)
AND ps.activity_id = #{activityId}
AND ps.activity_id = #{recruitActivityId}
AND pos.assignee_id = #{assigneeId}
AND pos.assignee_id IS NOT NULL
AND pos.assignee_id IS NULL
AND ( (pos.promote_link IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(pos.promote_link) <> '') OR (pos.short_link IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(pos.short_link) <> '') )
AND (pos.promote_link IS NULL OR BTRIM(pos.promote_link) = '') AND (pos.short_link IS NULL OR BTRIM(pos.short_link) = '') AND COALESCE(UPPER(pos.biz_status), '') NOT LIKE '%LINKED%' AND COALESCE(UPPER(pos.biz_status), '') NOT LIKE '%FOLLOWING%'
AND (pos.promote_link IS NULL OR BTRIM(pos.promote_link) = '') AND (pos.short_link IS NULL OR BTRIM(pos.short_link) = '') AND ( COALESCE(UPPER(pos.biz_status), '') LIKE '%LINKED%' OR COALESCE(UPPER(pos.biz_status), '') LIKE '%FOLLOWING%' )
AND ( (pos.promote_link IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(pos.promote_link) <> '') OR (pos.short_link IS NOT NULL AND BTRIM(pos.short_link) <> '') )
AND (pos.promote_link IS NULL OR BTRIM(pos.promote_link) = '') AND (pos.short_link IS NULL OR BTRIM(pos.short_link) = '')
AND (
ps.status = 0 OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%待审核%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%审核中%'
ps.status = 1 OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%推广中%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%推广%'
ps.status = 2 OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%未通过%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%拒绝%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%申请未通过%'
ps.status = 3 OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%终止%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%已终止%'
ps.status = 4 OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%合作前取消%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%取消%'
ps.status = 6 OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%过期%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%已过期%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%到期%' OR ps.status_text ILIKE '%已到期%'
1 = 1
)
AND ( CAST(ps.shop_id AS TEXT) = #{partnerId} OR LOWER(BTRIM(ps.shop_name)) = LOWER(BTRIM(#{partnerId})) )
AND ( CAST(ps.cos_type AS TEXT) = #{cooperationType} OR ps.cos_type_text ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{cooperationType}, '%') )
AND ps.status = 1
AND ps.status <> 1

CASE WHEN ps.promotion_start_time IS NULL OR BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) = '' THEN NULL WHEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) ~ '^[0-9]{13}$' THEN to_timestamp((BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time))::double precision / 1000) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai' WHEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) ~ '^[0-9]{10}$' THEN to_timestamp((BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time))::double precision) AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Shanghai' WHEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}T[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}' THEN REPLACE(SUBSTRING(BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time), 1, 19), 'T', ' ')::timestamp WHEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$' THEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time)::timestamp WHEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$' THEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time)::timestamp WHEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) ~ '^[0-9]{4}/[0-9]{2}/[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$' THEN to_timestamp(BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI:SS')::timestamp WHEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) ~ '^[0-9]{4}/[0-9]{2}/[0-9]{2} [0-9]{2}:[0-9]{2}$' THEN to_timestamp(BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time), 'YYYY/MM/DD HH24:MI')::timestamp WHEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time) ~ '^[0-9]{4}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{2}$' THEN BTRIM(ps.promotion_start_time)::date::timestamp ELSE NULL END
mapper.select:
SELECT ps.* FROM product_snapshot ps JOIN product_operation_state pos ON ps.activity_id = pos.activity_id AND ps.product_id = pos.product_id
ORDER BY CASE WHEN pos.pinned_until IS NOT NULL AND pos.pinned_until > #{now} THEN 0 ELSE 1 END ASC, DESC NULLS LAST, ps.sync_time DESC NULLS LAST, pos.selected_at DESC NULLS LAST, ps.activity_id ASC, ps.product_id ASC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM product_snapshot ps JOIN product_operation_state pos ON ps.activity_id = pos.activity_id AND ps.product_id = pos.product_id
